content.body: Interesting that such Web compat issues haven't ended up on my plate and it took Safari this long to end up with that conclusion.
annevk: Do you have a theory of how legitimate Web sites end up with bogus xn-- labels?
content.formatted_body: annevk: Do you have a theory of how legitimate Web sites end up with bogus xn-- labels?

content.body: Chromium's layer above ICU4C didn't look particularly coherent to me. I'm curious how that layer in Chromium came about, what problems it was supposed to fix, and if that layer is the cause of some new problems now.
Who has admin access to WICG org? I can't move back whatwg/sanitizer-api
